title: GregTech: Renewed
body:
## Texturepack inspired by old **GregTech** versions (1.7.10, 1.12),
Just like in a good old days!

Made mainly for GTCEu Modern, feel free to use as default texture in your modpacks

## **Current Content:**

- Plates
- Double Plates
- Casings




## **Planned:**


- Multiblocks
- Other materials
